results.rendered_html:
paitra a. (trī f.) [pituridaṃ aṇ]
1 Relating to a father or ancestors
(pb) generally, paternal, ancestral.
2 Sacred to the Manes.
— traṃ
1 The part of the hand between the forefinger and the thumb. (Also paitrpa in this sense).
2 A year, month, or day sacred to the Pitṛs.
